rationale: The citing paper is centrally about NWOM valence and explicitly says prior NWOM work examined relationship factors, while the cited paper directly tests how interpersonal closeness (a relationship factor) changes WOM valence and its motives. This makes the cited work a plausible substantive prior theory/comparison point rather than an obvious incidental mention. The DOI match (10.1509/jmr.13.0312) confirms the exact targeted reference.
